daily.today_energy: The vibes are giving balance meets breakthrough. Venus is whispering that you've got permission to stop overthinking and just *feel* your way through today. Trust that intuitive pull.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Whether it's romantic or platonic, there's genuine connection energy around you rn. Be your authentic self—that's your most magnetic move.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. The universe is amplifying your creativity, so pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your voice matters more than you think right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. A slow walk, some water, maybe journaling—whatever feels grounding. The energy suggests rest isn't laziness; it's alignment.
